---
title: "TRSE units: TVC"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE

# TVC

These paths are relative to `units/TVC/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `GE`
- `TVC`
- `crtc`
- `music`
- `system`
- `text`
